title: Health of boy thrown from Tate Modern takes ‘sad step backwards’, family say
summary_full: French child, six at time of 2019 attack, suffers setback in recovery after January operationThe family of a boy thrown from the 10th-storey balcony of the Tate Modern seven years ago said it feels as though his recovery has taken a “sad step backwards” after surgery.The unnamed French child was six when he was seriously hurt in an attack by Jonty Bravery at the London attraction in August 2019. Continue reading...
